recommendations.title: StreetDance 2
recommendations.overview: After suffering humiliation by the crew Invincible, street dancer Ash looks to gather the best dancers from around the world for a rematch.

recommendations.title: Center Stage
recommendations.overview: A group of 12 teenagers from various backgrounds enroll at the American Ballet Academy in New York to make it as ballet dancers and each one deals with the problems and stress of training and getting ahead in the world of dance.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Center Stage: Turn It Up
recommendations.overview: All self-taught dancer Kate Parker has ever wanted to do was perform with the American Academy of Ballet. But when she doesnt make it after auditioning, she learns that it takes more than precision and perfection to succeed in the dance world.

recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.

recommendations.title: Royal Wedding
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister dance act encounter challenges and romance when booked in London during the Royal Wedding.

recommendations.title: Take the Lead
recommendations.overview: A former professional dancer volunteers to teach dance in the New York public school system and, while his background first clashes with his students' tastes, together they create a completely new style of dance. Based on the story of ballroom dancer

recommendations.title: The Company
recommendations.overview: Ensemble drama centered around a group of ballet dancers, with a focus on one young dancer who's poised to become a principal performer.

recommendations.title: Honey: Rise Up and Dance
recommendations.overview: Street dancer Skyler comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, Tosha, & joins a dance competition with the Honey dance studio; the prize is a college scholarship.

recommendations.title: School Dance
